component.name: Mate Smart Lock
component.summary: Automatically lock and unlock your session based on Bluetooth proximity

description.p: Mate Smart Lock monitors a paired Bluetooth device, such as your phone, and locks your Linux session when the device goes out of range.
When the device reconnects, it can unlock the session again if your system policy allows it. The app runs as a lightweight GTK tray utility and stores settings locally.

ul.li: Monitor paired Bluetooth devices through BlueZ
Lock through desktop screensaver interfaces or systemd-logind
Configure polling interval and disconnect debounce
Override lock and unlock commands when needed

screenshot.caption: Select a paired Bluetooth device to monitor
Configure automatic lock and unlock behavior
